name: nodecmsguide-typecheck
description: Isolated workspace for `astro check`. It runs on the Volar language server, which needs TypeScript's JS compiler API — removed in the native TypeScript 7 compiler the app uses. Peer dependencies resolve per workspace package, so this importer supplies the check toolchain with TypeScript 6.x (maintained in feature lockstep with 7.x) without a pnpmfile, which Renovate ignores when regenerating lockfiles. Merge back into the root once Astro supports TS 7: https://github.com/withastro/roadmap/discussions/1321
